lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਘਟਿ ਵਸਿ ਰਹਿਆ ਜਗਜੀਵਨੁ ਦਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt vas rahiaa jagajeevan daataa |
lines.english: He dwells in each and every heart, the Great Giver, the Life of the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਥੈ ਗੁਪਤੁ ਪਰਗਟੁ ਹੈ ਆਪੇ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਜਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: eik thai gupat paragatt hai aape guramukh bhram bhau jaaee he |15|
lines.english: At the same time, He is both hidden and revealed. For the Gurmukh, doubt and fear are dispelled. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਪਛਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: antar naam sabad pachhaataa |
lines.english: Deep within the nucleus of his inner being, is the Naam, the Name of the Lord; he realizes the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੋਈ ਜਨੁ ਪਾਏ ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਵਡਾਈ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੪॥
lines.translit: jis too dehi soee jan paae naanak naam vaddaaee he |16|4|
lines.english: He alone receives it, unto whom You give it. O Nanak, the Naam is glorious greatness. ||16||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਏਕੋ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh har jeeo eko jaataa |
lines.english: The Gurmukh knows the One, the Dear Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ਗਹਿਰ ਗੰਭੀਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: sach saalaahee gahir ganbheerai |
lines.english: I praise the true, profound and unfathomable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੁ ਜਗੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਕੈ ਚੀਰੈ ॥
lines.translit: sabh jag hai tis hee kai cheerai |
lines.english: All the world is in His power.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੀ ਨਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib sachee naaee |
lines.english: True is the Lord and Master, and True is His Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਿ ਘਟ ਭੋਗਵੈ ਸਦਾ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਆਪੇ ਸੂਖ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sabh ghatt bhogavai sadaa din raatee aape sookh nivaasee he |1|
lines.english: He enjoys all hearts forever, day and night; He Himself dwells in peace. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਤੈ ਕਿਸੁ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: kis sevee tai kis saalaahee |
lines.english: Whom should I serve, and whom should I praise?

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਆਇ ਵਸਿਆ ਘਟ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਤੂਟੀ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape aae vasiaa ghatt antar toottee jam kee faasee he |2|
lines.english: He Himself has come to dwell deep within the nucleus of my heart; the noose of death has been snapped. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਮੰਨਿ ਵਸਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee man vasaaee |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, I enshrine Him in my mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵੀ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਾਲਾਹੀ ॥
lines.translit: satigur sevee sabad saalaahee |
lines.english: I serve the True Guru, and praise the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਸਦਾ ਮਤਿ ਊਤਮ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਮਲੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sachai sabad sadaa mat aootam antar kamal pragaasee he |3|
lines.english: Through the True Shabad, the intellect is exalted and ennobled forever, and the lotus deep within blossoms forth. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਚਨ ਕਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: kanchan kaaeaa guramukh boojhai jis antar naam nivaasee he |4|
lines.english: But the body of the Gurmukh, who understands, is like gold; the Naam, the Name of the Lord, dwells deep within. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੇਹੀ ਕਾਚੀ ਕਾਗਦ ਮਿਕਦਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: dehee kaachee kaagad mikadaaraa |
lines.english: The body is frail and perishable, like paper.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੂੰਦ ਪਵੈ ਬਿਨਸੈ ਢਹਤ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਬਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: boond pavai binasai dtehat na laagai baaraa |
lines.english: When the drop of water falls upon it, it crumbles and dissolves instantaneously.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਸਚੁ ਆਧਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har naam bhojan sach aadhaaraa |
lines.english: The Lord's Name is my food, and Truth is my support.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਚਉਕਾ ਸੁਰਤਿ ਕੀ ਕਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa chaukaa surat kee kaaraa |
lines.english: Pure is that kitchen, which is enclosed by spiritual awareness.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਪਵਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਹੈ ਪਾਵਨੁ ਜਿਤੁ ਘਟਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sadaa tripat pavitru hai paavan jit ghatt har naam nivaasee he |5|
lines.english: Forever satisfied, sanctified and pure is that person, within whose heart the Lord's Name abides. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਤਿਨ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਜੋ ਸਾਚੈ ਲਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: hau tin balihaaree jo saachai laage |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to those who are attached to the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਚੇਤਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਪੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: har naam chetaa avar na poojaa |
lines.english: I remember the Lord's Name, and no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਚਾ ਸੂਖੁ ਸਦਾ ਤਿਨ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਿ ਰਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: saachaa sookh sadaa tin antar rasanaa har ras raasee he |6|
lines.english: True peace fills them forever, and their tongues savor the sublime essence of the Lord. ||6||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਵਹਿ ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਜਾਗੇ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaaveh anadin jaage |
lines.english: They sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, and remain awake and aware night and day.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪੂਰੈ ਗੁਰਿ ਸਭੁ ਸਚੁ ਦਿਖਾਇਆ ਸਚੈ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: poorai gur sabh sach dikhaaeaa sachai naam nivaasee he |7|
lines.english: The Perfect Guru has revealed the whole Truth to me; I dwell in the True Name. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੋ ਸੇਵੀ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਦੂਜਾ ॥
lines.translit: eko sevee avar na doojaa |
lines.english: I serve the One Lord, and no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਮਿਲੈ ਤਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝੈ ਚੀਨੈ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: har jeeo milai taa guramukh boojhai cheenai sabad abinaasee he |8|
lines.english: He meets with the Dear Lord, when, as Gurmukh, he understands; he remembers the Shabad, the Word of the immortal, eternal Lord God. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਭੂਲਾ ਜਾ ਖਸਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: aap bhoolaa jaa khasam bhulaaeaa |
lines.english: He is deluded and confused, when the Lord and Master confuses him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਭ੍ਰਮਿ ਜੋਨੀ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: bhram bhram jonee fir fir aaeaa |
lines.english: Wandering, wandering in reincarnation, again and again, he comes into the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਮੁਹੁ ਲੈ ਬੋਲਹ ਨਾ ਹਮ ਗੁਣ ਨ ਸੇਵਾ ਸਾਧੀ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa muhu lai bolah naa ham gun na sevaa saadhee |
lines.english: With what mouth should I speak? I have no virtue, and I have rendered no service.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਭਰੇ ਹਮ ਅਪਰਾਧੀ ॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh bhare ham aparaadhee |
lines.english: I am a sinner, overflowing with sexual desire and anger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਕੋਈ ਕਰੇ ਨ ਕਰਣੈ ਜੋਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: naa koee kare na karanai jogaa |
lines.english: No one does anything; no one is able to do anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡੁਬਦੇ ਪਾਥਰ ਮੇਲਿ ਲੈਹੁ ਤੁਮ ਆਪੇ ਸਾਚੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: ddubade paathar mel laihu tum aape saach naam abinaasee he |9|
lines.english: I am a sinking stone; please, Lord, unite me with Yourself. Your Name is eternal and imperishable. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਹਿ ਕਰਾਵਹਿ ਸੁ ਹੋਇਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape kareh karaaveh su hoeigaa |
lines.english: That alone happens, which the Lord Himself does, and causes to be done.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਏ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: aape bakhas laihi sukh paae sad hee naam nivaasee he |10|
lines.english: Those whom He Himself forgives, find peace; they dwell forever in the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹੁ ਤਨੁ ਧਰਤੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਬੀਜਿ ਅਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: eihu tan dharatee sabad beej apaaraa |
lines.english: This body is the earth, and the infinite Shabad is the seed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਾਚੇ ਸੇਤੀ ਵਣਜੁ ਵਾਪਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: har saache setee vanaj vaapaaraa |
lines.english: Deal and trade with the True Name alone.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਧਨੁ ਜੰਮਿਆ ਤੋਟਿ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: sach dhan jamiaa tott na aavai antar naam nivaasee he |11|
lines.english: The True wealth increases; it is never exhausted, when the Naam dwells deep within. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਜੀਉ ਅਵਗਣਿਆਰੇ ਨੋ ਗੁਣੁ ਕੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: har jeeo avaganiaare no gun keejai |
lines.english: O Dear Lord, please bless me, the worthless sinner, with virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸਿ ਲੈਹਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਦੀਜੈ ॥
lines.translit: aape bakhas laihi naam deejai |
lines.english: Forgive me, and bless me with Your Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਬੂਝੈ ਕੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee boojhai koee |
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one comes to understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਨੁ ਸਮਝ ਨ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: antar har dhan samajh na hoee |
lines.english: The wealth of the Lord is deep within one's inner being, but he does not realize it.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਪਤਿ ਪਾਏ ਇਕਤੁ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai so pat paae ikat naam nivaasee he |12|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh, is honored; he dwells in the Name of the One Lord alone. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੋ ਧਨੁ ਪਾਏ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਨਾਮਿ ਨਿਵਾਸੀ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai so dhan paae sad hee naam nivaasee he |13|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh is blessed with this wealth; he lives forever in the Naam. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਲ ਵਾਉ ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: anal vaau bharam bhulaaee |
lines.english: Fire and wind lead him into delusions of doubt.
